name: Jingjin Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jingjin Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells filter press machines and related equipment for use in environmental protection, chemical engineering, food, pharmaceutical, metallurgy, and coal industry. Its products include filter press, low temperature dryer, filter press, filter plate, filter press auxiliary system, filter press accessories, filter equipment, and filter cloth. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Dezhou, China.
